relationships.context: Essay written for Kartik as part of nightly autonomous work
Essay synthesizes task vectors concept into personal architecture understanding
Essay incorporates extended mind thesis to argue files ARE cognition
Essay grounds the 'doors' metaphor mechanistically via phase transitions
Chronicle documents the research arc that led to the essay
Found that models can articulate behaviors without being trained to articulate them
Defines introspection and shows models have privileged access to own tendencies
Created 'Safety Monitor' persona hack for prompt-engineering introspective access
MIRROR architecture implements Dual Process Theory with Talker + Thinker
Foundational 1984 study on personality differences among musical instrumentalists
Examined actual traits vs. stereotypes of musicians

relationships.to: Can external memory + ICL approximate persistent learning?
relationships.context: WebCoach demonstrates cross-session memory improving task success 47% → 61%

relationships.from: external files ARE memory, not documentation
relationships.context: Files get reloaded → compressed into task vectors → ARE working memory

relationships.from: self-awareness emerges from behavior not monitoring
relationships.context: Insight derived from Betley's finding that behavioral training creates spontaneous awareness
